title: Zubala: Ancient meeting point for caravans, pilgrims in Saudi Arabia
description: The village of Zubala in Saudi Arabia’s Northern Borders region is considered one of the most important civilizational landmarks on the Arabian Peninsula. (SPA) RIYADH: The village of Zubala in Saudi Arabia’s Northern Borders Region is considered one of the most important civilizational landmarks on the Arabian Peninsula. It served as a vital meeting point [...]

title: Thailand’s Royal Ploughing Ceremony marks ancient tradition and the start of rice season
description: BANGKOK, Thailand – The Royal Ploughing Ceremony remains one of Thailand’s most enduring traditions, blending history, spirituality, and agriculture into a single event that continues to hold relevance in modern society. Held each year in May, the ceremony signals the start of the rice-growing season and celebrates the country’s long-standing connection to farming, a sector [...]

title: Ancient teeth hint at canoodling between early human relatives
description: NEW YORK (AP) — An analysis of ancient teeth is giving scientists a rare peek into interactions between human relatives hundreds of thousands of years ago that have left a lasting imprint on our species.
